# 🤝 Contributing to Holly Android

Thank you for your interest in contributing to **Holly Android** by [T3rmuxk1ng](https://youtube.com/@T3rmuxk1ng)!

## 📋 Code of Conduct

- Be respectful and constructive
- Focus on privacy-first, offline-first design principles
- Do not submit code that sends user data externally

## 🚀 How to Contribute

1. **Fork** the repository
2. **Create** a feature branch: `git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name`
3. **Code** your changes following our style guidelines
4. **Test** your changes on a real device (emulator may not support all features)
5. **Commit** with descriptive messages: `git commit -m 'Add: your feature description'`
6. **Push** to your branch: `git push origin feature/your-feature-name`
7. **Open** a Pull Request with a clear description

## 📐 Code Style

- **Kotlin**: Follow [Kotlin Coding Conventions](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/coding-conventions.html)
- **Compose**: Use Material 3 components and theming
- **Naming**: Use descriptive variable and function names
- **Comments**: Document complex logic and voice command patterns

## 🐛 Bug Reports

When filing a bug report, please include:
- Android version and device model
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected vs actual behavior
- Logcat output (filter by `HollyVoiceService` tag)

## ✨ Feature Requests

We welcome feature requests! Please describe:
- The voice command or use case
- Expected behavior
- Whether it requires internet or can work offline

## 🔒 Security & Privacy

- Never commit API keys, access keys, or credentials
- All features must work offline by default
- Report security vulnerabilities privately
- Respect user privacy in all contributions

## 📺 Community

Join the [T3rmuxk1ng YouTube channel](https://youtube.com/@T3rmuxk1ng) for tutorials, demos, and community updates!
